description:
As an external system linking to the app with a client context
  I want the app to resolve the context ID to a client profile
  So that the user sees the client detail directly without searching

elements.name: Deeplink with a valid context ID loads the client

steps.name: I open the deeplink URL "/update/ctx-abc123"
I should see a loading indicator
the client profile should load automatically
I should be redirected to "/client" with no client ID in the URL
I should see a client named "Alice Johnson"
I should see all 5 client attributes
I open the deeplink URL "/update/ctx-abc123"
the client profile is loaded
I click "Edit" next to "Phone Number"
I should be on Step 1 of the wizard
the URL should be "/client/edit/phone"
I enter "+1 (555) 999-0000" as the new value
I click "Review Changes"
I should be on Step 2 of the wizard at URL "/client/verify"
I click "Confirm & Save"
I should be on Step 3 of the wizard at URL "/client/confirmation"
I should see a success message

elements.name: Deeplink with an invalid context ID shows an error

steps.name: I open the deeplink URL "/update/ctx-invalid-xyz"
I should see an error message about invalid or expired context
I should see a "Back to Search" link

elements.name: No client ID appears in any URL during deeplink flow

steps.name: I open the deeplink URL "/update/ctx-def456"
the client profile is loaded
the URL should not contain "2"
I click "Edit" next to "Full Name"
the URL should not contain "2"
I enter "Bob W. Williams" as the new value
I click "Review Changes"
the URL should not contain "2"
I click "Confirm & Save"
the URL should not contain "2"

name: Deeplink Entry - Load Client via Context ID

description:
As an authorised user accessing the app directly
  I want to search for a client and update one of their attributes
  So that I can keep client data accurate without exposing PII in URLs

elements.name: Search for a client and view their details

steps.name: the app is open at the home page
the URL should not contain any client ID
I search for "Alice"
I should see a search result for "Alice Johnson"
I select "Alice Johnson" from the results
I should be on the client detail page at URL "/client"
I should see all 5 client attributes

elements.name: Edit a client's email address through the full wizard

steps.name: the app is open at the home page
the URL should not contain any client ID
I search for "Alice"
I select "Alice Johnson" from the results
I click "Edit" next to "Email Address"
I should be on Step 1 of the wizard
the URL should be "/client/edit/email"
I enter "alice.updated@example.com" as the new value
I click "Review Changes"
I should be on Step 2 of the wizard at URL "/client/verify"
I should see the current value "alice.johnson@example.com"
I should see the new value "alice.updated@example.com"
I click "Confirm & Save"
I should be on Step 3 of the wizard at URL "/client/confirmation"
I should see a success message
the app is open at the home page
the URL should not contain any client ID
I search for "Alice"
I select "Alice Johnson" from the results
I click "Edit" next to "Full Name"
I should be on Step 1 of the wizard
I enter "Alice M. Johnson" as the new value
I click "Review Changes"
I should be on Step 2 of the wizard at URL "/client/verify"
I click "Confirm & Save"
I should see a success message

elements.name: Cancel an edit and return to client detail

steps.name: the app is open at the home page
the URL should not contain any client ID
I search for "Alice"
I select "Alice Johnson" from the results
I click "Edit" next to "Phone Number"
I should be on Step 1 of the wizard
I click "Cancel"
I should be on the client detail page at URL "/client"

elements.name: Validation prevents submitting the same value

steps.name: the app is open at the home page
the URL should not contain any client ID
I search for "Alice"
I select "Alice Johnson" from the results
I click "Edit" next to "Email Address"
I enter "alice.johnson@example.com" as the new value
the "Review Changes" button should be disabled
the app is open at the home page
the URL should not contain any client ID
I search for "zzznoresults"
I should see a no-results message

name: Direct Entry - Search and Update Client Attribute

description:
As a user of the Client Updater App
  My accessible functionality should depend on my active role

elements.name: Advisor can only see their own clients

steps.name: I log in as an "advisor"
the app is open at the home page
I should see the advisor home page
I search for "Alice"
I should see a search result for "Alice Johnson"
I search for "Carol"
I should see a no-results message

elements.name: Support staff can act on behalf of an advisor

steps.name: I log in as "support_staff"
the app is open at the home page
I should see the support staff home page
I click "Work on Behalf of Advisor →"
I should be redirected to "/select-advisor" with no client ID in the URL
I enter "adv-2" as the advisor ID and submit
I should be redirected to "/" with no client ID in the URL
I should see the advisor context banner for "James Carter"
I search for "Carol"
I should see a search result for "Carol Martinez"

elements.name: Support staff can look up a client directly by ID

steps.name: I log in as "support_staff"
the app is open at the home page
I lookup client ID "c-3"
the client profile should load automatically
I should see a client named "Carol Martinez"

name: Role-Aware Flows
